## Scope check
- [ ] This does not require bypassing DRM, watermarks, or platform Terms of Service.
- [ ] This is in line with the project's archival-use philosophy (see [DISCLAIMER.md](../../DISCLAIMER.md)).
- [ ] This does not pull in new third-party dependencies, OR I have a strong reason to add one (please justify below).
